---
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# MAJOR THEMES
:::

::::::::::::::::::::::::: grid
::::::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: theme-pill
Aerodynamics and Aeroacoustics
:::

::: theme-pill
AI-ML for design
:::

::: theme-pill
Bio-materials and mechanics
:::

::: theme-pill
Composite materials
:::

::: theme-pill
Duct acoustics / Thermo-acoustics
:::

::: theme-pill
Dynamics and control
:::

::: theme-pill
Experimental Mechanics
:::

::: theme-pill
Fault diagnostics and prognostics
:::

::: theme-pill
Fluid-structure interaction
:::

::: theme-pill
Hydro-acoustics
:::
:::::::::::::

::::::::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: theme-pill
Mechanical meta-materials
:::

::: theme-pill
MEMS/NEMS and semiconductors
:::

::: theme-pill
Recent advances in material science
:::

::: theme-pill
Signal processing for mechanical system
:::

::: theme-pill
Solid mechanics and design
:::

::: theme-pill
Structural acoustics
:::

::: theme-pill
Structural vibration
:::

::: theme-pill
Surface science and corrosion engineering
:::

::: theme-pill
Vibration energy harvester
:::

::: theme-pill
Wave propagation in elastic media
:::
:::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::
